entry: From the desk: Our champion mr_d1_t1_s6 is holding strong at 85/100 survivability, and we won 72% of the last 24h of closed trades. The edge is still marginal, but it's measured, and measured beats hoped.
good_signals: our champion MR_d1_t1_s6 is holding strong at 85/100 survivability
we won 72% of the last 24h of closed trades
the timer study says our best hold captures +0.424%/trade
the drop×bounce lab found a -1.881%/trade edge at drop 6.0%→target 5.0%
regime classification is live on 2 book(s) so we can read the tape before betting
what: A human-voice daily log that surfaces something genuinely good each run.
note: Composed only from true state — never invents wins.
